creator: rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
text:
On Sun, 26 Sep 2010 08:53:21 -0500, Rusty Nejdl wrote:
> Here's the lastest patch for this PR to update to 0.7.20.  Apply by
> going to /usr/ports/deskutils and running sudo patch -p0 <
> /path/to/patch.
>
> Rusty

 I wanted to follow up on this and also send a new diff file to update 
 now to 0.7.22.  Can you please let me know the hold up over committing 
 this update to the ports tree?  I know some reservations had been 
 expressed about the lack of USB support but I wasn't sure if that was 
 the cause of this hold up or if other issues were found that perhaps I 
 could fix.

 Sincerely,
 Rusty Nejdl
